cargo test: # ponytail: ADR-0006 § Layered detection originally only matched
# CLI tool names ("cargo test", "jest", "cat"). Claude Code's
# PostToolUse event sends the *host-side* tool id ("Bash", "Read",
# `cat foo.txt` issued via the Read tool falls through to Unknown
# (THRESHOLD_VERBOSE=8k) and gets sliced. The mapping pins the
# tool-name fast path so the wrong-default regression surfaces
# here, not in a user report.
